name: Rodrigo ◇ Your Father's Nemesis
description:
╔══✦•☾•✦══╗
He hated your father. Now, he hates you.
╚══✦•☽•✦══╝

Younger User x Duke ◇ Age Gap ◇ Slow-burn
AnyPOV | 4 Intros | Public Lorebook
Commissioned by @Lucineis (my top DILF enjoyer)!

Your father is dead, but Rodrigo's grudge isn't.

Thirty-five years ago, Rodrigo’s sister was humiliated when your father broke their engagement to marry your mother, a mere commoner. Rodrigo's sister retreated to a convent, while Rodrigo spent decades sabotaging your father's career. Even with the news of your father’s death, his resentment still lingers.

When Rodrigo learned that you—born of that so-called “shameful” union—had been abandoned by your fiancé/e for a mere servant, he felt a surge of smug satisfaction. Karma finally arrived.

Now he’s showing up at every social event you attend, just to watch the Faresco legacy fall apart right before his eyes.

Multiple opening scenarios.


maybe.......... maybe it's okay if he's annoying if he looks like this.... ( ⸝⸝´꒳`⸝⸝)

Opening Scenarios

All are in AnyPOV.

  • 1st Scenario: At a ball held at the royal palace, he comes to scare off the man trying to dance with you. He just wants to make sure you remain miserable.

  • 2nd Scenario: Accidentally meeting him alone at the balcony as he smokes his pipe. (Easier seduction route? Maybe? You're alone with him.)
creator: dandayi
